description: Global editor support catalog: field definitions and panel rules per section type. Use when building theme sections and when resolving theme editor settings panels.

fields.description: Fallback when no announcement block text is set.

fields.description: Manage visibility in customer account settings. Legacy accounts not supported.

fields.description: Icons are always used on mobile

fields.description: Logo will remain visible when sticky header is active

fields.description: Features are populated from your menu links

fields.description: Display payment method icons in the utilities bar when enabled.

fields.description: Show Follow on Shop button when the store supports it.

fields.description: Update your store name in general settings.

fields.description: Create and edit store policies in settings.
